title: GitHub Dependabot Alerts
description: Dependabot alerts imported from GitHub Security.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting investigation of Dependabot findings. Moving epic to in_progress; next step is to identify linked child issues and validate fixes with tests before closing anything.

comments.text: All current child Dependabot findings under this epic were remediated and verified in repository checks. rust/Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock updated; make check passed on 2026-03-11.
